title: Initial Launch
summary: First release of The Arc — Arcon's internal tools platform. Includes CRM, E-Commerce store management, HR tools, company communications, and a configurable dashboard.

changes.description: CRM module with Customers, Vendors, Contacts, Opportunities, and Tasks
CRM bulk import from Insightly CSV exports for contacts and opportunities
Opportunity pipeline stage tracking with history
CRM task management with priority, comments, attachments, and progress tracking
CRM sales goals configuration and quick-fill via admin panel
CRM tagging system for customers, vendors, and contacts
Brand data enrichment via Brandfetch integration
Artwork library per customer with Cloudinary upload and vectorization
Online Stores with visual Gantt timeline and urgency status
Store detail tabs: Overview, Team, CRM Links, Tasks, Add Tracking
New Customer creation with direct push to Aturian (commissioned client, tax exempt, contact department)
Employee Directory with profiles, bios, skills, and manager hierarchy
Documents section with Google Drive integration
News & Announcements with Tiptap rich-text editor, cover images, and article types
Hero carousel banner with image upload and draft/publish workflow
Scrolling ticker strip with birthdays, anniversaries, news, holidays, and ClickUp tasks
Event countdown timer in the topbar
Birthdays & Anniversaries page with upcoming events
My Tasks dashboard card with live ClickUp integration per user
Google Search and Gmail quick-access in the topbar
Collapsible sidebar navigation with persistent section state
Billing and shipping address management on CRM records
Brand details panel with logo, colors, and company info on customer/vendor records
Search, filtering, and pagination on CRM listing pages
Per-user encrypted API credential storage
Audit log for user actions
Google Analytics (GA4) integration
Mobile-responsive layout
